turns.text: Can I merge Alex Mignogna's profile with Alexandra Mignogna's profile?  her.

I can help you with that! Since you're a coach reporting on behalf of one of your players, I'll get this submitted for the support team to review.

To locate both profiles, could you share the UTR profile links or Player IDs for Alex Mignogna and Alexandra Mignogna? If you don't have the URLs, the display names and their locations will work too.

https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/3868300 is the one she would like to keep.  https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5756403 is the one she would like added.  Obviously, while she is a player for me, I would like Lewis & Clark College to be on her profile, if that makes sense?

Got it — so the primary profile to keep is [Alex Mignogna (3868300)](https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/3868300) and the duplicate to merge is [Alexandra Mignogna (5756403)](https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5756403). I'll make sure to note the request to have Lewis & Clark College reflected on her profile as well.

Which profile should be kept as primary — the Alex Mignogna one (3868300)?

And just to confirm before I submit: could you share your name and email address?
Yes, Alex Mignogna (3868300) is the one she would like to keep.  Jimmy, head coach [location] & Clark College.  My personal email is [email].  I also use [email] as the UTR account.
Thanks, Jimmy! Let me get that ticket submitted for you now.

Your support ticket has been submitted — your ticket number is #847758. Our team typically replies within four business days, working through requests in the order they're received. Thanks for your patience!

Just a heads-up: the support team will review the merge request and work to combine the two profiles, with Alex Mignogna (3868300) as the primary. I've also noted the request to have Lewis & Clark College reflected on her profile. Please avoid creating any new accounts or making significant changes to either profile while the review is in progress.

Is there anything else I can help you with?
I can help you with that! To get started, which of the following best describes your situation?
Reporting duplicate profiles of my kids

Got it! I'll help you report duplicate profiles for your child. I'll need a few details to get this submitted.

Could you please provide:

1. Your child's full name
2. Their location (city/state and country)
3. Links or Player IDs for the duplicate profiles (or the display names shown on each profile if you don't have the links)
4. Your preferred account email address

1, XIAORAN WANG
2, LONDON, UNITED KINGDOM
3, https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5084927        https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5507375
4, [email]
Thank you! Let me look up some information on what to expect when reporting duplicate profiles.

Here's what you can expect after submitting your request:

- The support team will manually review the duplicate profiles.
- The review process may take several business days depending on volume.
- You may be contacted if additional information (such as photo ID) is needed to verify the profiles.
- You'll be notified once the review is complete.
- Please avoid creating any new accounts or making significant changes to the profiles while the request is under review.

Here's a summary of what I'll submit:

- Child's name: Xiaoran Wang
- Location: London, United Kingdom
- Primary profile: https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5084927
- Duplicate profile: https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5507375
- Your email: [email]

Is there anything else you'd like to add, or shall I go ahead and submit the ticket?
yes please go ahead

Your support ticket has been submitted successfully — your ticket number is #829592.

The support team will review the duplicate profiles for Xiaoran Wang and reach out if they need any additional information. Remember to avoid making significant changes to either profile while the request is being processed.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
no thx
You're welcome! Have a great day! 😊
I'd be happy to help with Pro Tennis Tour (PTT) information! What would you like to know?
Tournament Schedule
Let me look that up for you!

The Pro Tennis Tour Tournament Calendar lets you browse and filter tournaments by several options, including gender, date, region, country, surface type (grass, clay, hard, carpet, indoor/outdoor), and status (live, upcoming, registration open, or complete).
Is there anything specific about the schedule you'd like to know, such as a particular region or surface type? Or is there anything else I can help you with?
Of course! Is there anything else about the Pro Tennis Tour you'd like to know?
broken link it says Page not found.
I apologize for that! Let me search for the correct link for you.

sorry that — I don't have a verified working link for the PTT Tournament Calendar in my resources. To avoid sending you to another broken page, I'd recommend visiting the UTR Sports website directly and navigating to the Pro Tennis Tour section from there.

Would you like me to escalate this to a human support agent who can provide you with the correct link? If so, I'll just need your full name, email address, and a brief summary of what you're looking for.
